title: Borscht
ingredients: Sour cream and dill for serving
instructions: Peel and grate beets, carrot, and dice potatoes and onion.
Heat oil in a large pot, sauté onion and carrot until soft.
Add beets and tomato paste, cook 5 minutes.
Add potatoes, cabbage, and broth. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve with sour cream and dill.
